glosses.vi: mức độ nghiêm trọng; trọng lực

sentences.target: Tu comprends la gravité de tout ça.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔ̃.pʁɑ̃ la ɡʁa.vi.te də tu sa/

translations.fr: Tu comprends la gravité de tout ça.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔ̃.pʁɑ̃ la ɡʁa.vi.te də tu sa/
translations.en: You understand the seriousness of all this.
translations.es: Entiendes la gravedad de todo esto.
translations.de: Du verstehst den Ernst der ganzen Sache.
translations.it: Capisci la gravità di tutto questo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你明白这一切的严重性。
translations.yue: 你明白成件事有幾嚴重。
translations.pt: Você entende a gravidade de tudo isso.
translations.he: אתה מבין את חומרת כל זה.
translations.vi: Bạn hiểu mức độ nghiêm trọng của mọi chuyện này.
translations.ar: أنت تفهم مدى خطورة كل هذا.
translations.nl: Je begrijpt de ernst van dit alles.
translations.hi: तुम इस सब की गंभीरता समझते हो.
translations.nb: Du forstår alvoret i alt dette.
translations.id: Kamu mengerti betapa seriusnya semua ini.
translations.sv: Du förstår allvaret i allt detta.
translations.da: Du forstår alvoren i alt det her.
translations.ja: あなたはこのことの深刻さを理解しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; serves as the sentence’s subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun ‘gravité’.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘comprends’.
Preposition introducing the complement ‘de tout ça’.
Indefinite pronoun; forms the expression ‘tout ça’ functioning as the complement of ‘de’.
Demonstrative pronoun (colloquial form of ‘cela’); completes the phrase ‘tout ça’.

sentences.target: On sous-estime la gravité de son état.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ su.z‿ɛs.tim la ɡʁa.vi.te də sɔ̃ e.ta/

translations.fr: On sous-estime la gravité de son état.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ su.z‿ɛs.tim la ɡʁa.vi.te də sɔ̃ e.ta/
translations.en: We underestimate the seriousness of his condition.
translations.es: Subestimamos la gravedad de su estado.
translations.de: Wir unterschätzen die Schwere seines Zustands.
translations.it: Sottovalutiamo la gravità delle sue condizioni.
translations.ko: 우리는 그의 상태의 심각성을 과소평가하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们低估了他病情的严重性。
translations.yue: 我哋低估咗佢病情嘅嚴重性。
translations.pt: Subestimamos a gravidade do estado dele.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đánh giá thấp mức độ nghiêm trọng của tình trạng anh ấy.
translations.nl: We onderschatten de ernst van zijn toestand.
translations.hi: हम उसकी हालत की गंभीरता को कम आँक रहे हैं.
translations.el: Υποτιμούμε τη σοβαρότητα της κατάστασής του.
translations.nb: Vi undervurderer alvoret i tilstanden hans.
translations.sv: Vi underskattar allvaret i hans tillstånd.
translations.da: Vi undervurderer alvoren i hans tilstand.
translations.ja: 私たちは彼の容体の深刻さを過小評価しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, morphologically 3rd person singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘gravité’.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘sous-estime’.
Preposition introducing the noun phrase ‘de son état’.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees with masculine singular noun ‘état’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘de’.

translations.en: I explain gravity to the kids.
translations.es: Les explico la gravedad a los niños.
translations.de: Ich erkläre den Kindern die Schwerkraft.
translations.yue: 我同啲小朋友解釋重力。
translations.pt: Eu explico a gravidade para as crianças.
translations.he: אני מסביר לילדים על כוח המשיכה.
translations.vi: Tôi giải thích lực hấp dẫn cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Ik leg de zwaartekracht uit aan de kinderen.
translations.hi: मैं बच्चों को गुरुत्वाकर्षण समझाता हूँ.
translations.ja: 子どもたちに重力を説明します。

tokens.explanation: Fused clitic pronoun ‘je’ (contracted as J’) attached to the finite verb ‘explique’; present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘gravité’.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘J'explique’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘les’; introduces the indirect object ‘aux enfants’.
Common noun, plural; indirect object of ‘expliquer’ governed by ‘à’.

sentences.target: Le médecin insiste sur la gravité du cas.
sentences.reading: /lə med.sɛ̃ ɛ̃.sist syʁ la ɡʁa.vi.te dy ka/

translations.fr: Le médecin insiste sur la gravité du cas.
translations.ipa: /lə med.sɛ̃ ɛ̃.sist syʁ la ɡʁa.vi.te dy ka/
translations.en: The doctor insists on the seriousness of the case.
translations.es: El médico insiste en la gravedad del caso.
translations.de: Der Arzt betont die Schwere des Falls.
translations.it: Il medico insiste sulla gravità del caso.
translations.zh-Hans: 医生强调病例的严重性。
translations.yue: 醫生強調個案嘅嚴重性。
translations.pt: O médico insiste na gravidade do caso.
translations.tr: Doktor vakanın ciddiyeti konusunda ısrar ediyor.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ nhấn mạnh mức độ nghiêm trọng của ca bệnh.
translations.nl: De arts benadrukt de ernst van het geval.
translations.hu: Az orvos az eset súlyosságát hangsúlyozza.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मामले की गंभीरता पर ज़ोर देता है.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός επιμένει στη σοβαρότητα της περίπτωσης.
translations.nb: Legen insisterer på alvoret i tilfellet.
translations.sv: Läkaren insisterar på allvaret i fallet.
translations.da: Lægen insisterer på alvoren i sagen.
translations.ja: 医者はその症例の深刻さを強調する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘médecin’.
Common noun, masculine; subject of ‘insiste’.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition introducing the complement ‘sur la gravité du cas’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘gravité’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘sur’.
Contraction of ‘de’ + ‘le’; introduces the noun complement ‘du cas’ modifying ‘gravité’.
Common noun, masculine; object of ‘du’.
